'''Ram Raders''' was a [[Gender/Legends|Human male]] who served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], holding the rank of [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]].

==Biography==
During the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], Raders was stationed aboard the [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']] where he helped [[Nejaa Halcyon]] drive off an army of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] that boarded the ship. He, along with [[Private/Legends|Private]] [[Slane Vick]], [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Omin L'Loxx]], and [[Grudo]] went on a recon mission to the Separatist headquarters, and later fought along [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Trooper/Legends|Trooper]] [[Odie Subu]], and Private Vick to rescue the Separatist prisoners. He was present at the capture of [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]].
